_comment: Deterministic QA scenario — TX1 742 Birchwood Lane NE. Source of truth for exact-count gates (BACKLOG-1848 / epic BACKLOG-1847). Every count is corpus-derived and asserted EXACTLY. Set identity is (subject, shifted-date), NEVER Message-ID.
description: TX1 742 Birchwood Lane NE, Tumwater WA — Outlook auto-link ceremony
_sourceTimezone_comment: IANA tz of the corpus authors (Tumwater WA = Pacific). The canonical checklist dates are LOCAL to this zone; the DB stores sent_at in UTC, so H3 (BACKLOG-1850) converts sent_at into this zone to match (subject, shifted-date). Consumed by scripts/qa/harness/db-assert.js. FU: H1 (BACKLOG-1848) to formalize in ScenarioManifest/zod.

seed._comment: Machine-local seeding inputs consumed by the Outlook seeder (scripts/qa/email/seed-m365.py). Adjust corpusDir/tokenFile per machine; H4 (BACKLOG-1851) owns full seed config.

searchQueries._comment: Fixed determinism query set for QA-H6 (BACKLOG-1853). Read RAW (outside H1 zod, like sourceTimezone) by scripts/qa/harness/search-attach-measure.js. Each query's EXACT expectation is derived from the committed canonical checklist by scripts/qa/harness/search-expectations.ts. kind: contact=email_participants address match (whole-corpus = canonical subset, sound because each contact is TX1-confined); subject=subject-only LIKE (TX1-confined phrase); freetext=app 3-column LIKE (subject|sender|body_plain, lower-bounded by the subject subset); bcc=participant role='bcc' + free-text non-leak invariant.

edgeCases._comment: QA-H7 edge-case matrix (BACKLOG-1854). Read RAW (outside H1 zod, like searchQueries/sourceTimezone) by scripts/qa/harness/edge-case-measure.js + edge-case-asserter.ts. timezoneBoundary: the 4 evening rows (corpus Date >= 16:00 -0800) that land +1 day in DB UTC sent_at; expectedShiftedDate is the LOCAL (source-timezone) date the app's shiftedDateOf must recover — proving the +1-day UTC storage is correctly pulled back to the checklist date (BACKLOG-1887). Subjects/dates are the DB-CONFIRMED canonical rows 4, 5, 33, 67.

timezoneBoundary.subject: Re: 742 Birchwood Lane showing today - thoughts?
Pest Inspection Report - 3267 Sunset Blvd, Centralia WA
Re: 742 Birchwood Lane - Walkthrough Complete - All Good!

edgeCases._signatureProbe_comment: Signature-address false-positive probe (BACKLOG-1854). michelle.torres@gmail.com is a REAL corpus participant of the OTHER (Torres-buyer) transaction, NOT a TX1 contact. Invariant: a signature-block mention must NOT create a TX1 participant link — so the participant-derived set scoped to TX1 contacts must never surface this address's unrelated mail. signatureProbeIsContact=false → the probe's TX1-participant set must be EXACTLY 0.

logScan._comment: Log cells (telemetry BACKLOG-1843 + redaction BACKLOG-1785). logPaths: real main.log candidates (first existing wins); when absent the committed telemetryFixture is the CI source of truth. redactionAllowlist: address substrings that are NOT leaks (build/noreply). The redaction cell is REPORTED-NOT-GATED until 1785 lands.
